# Meilisearch

> This is a Sourcey-generated docs site for Meilisearch, an ultra-fast, open-source search engine written in Rust.

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](/getting-started/introduction.html): This is a Sourcey-generated docs site for Meilisearch, an ultra-fast, open-source search engine written in Rust.
- [Quickstart](/getting-started/quickstart.html): This site was built with Sourcey 3.6.5 using the `openapi` and `markdown` adapters.
- [Concepts](/getting-started/concepts.html): Sourcey renders the OpenAPI spec into:
- [Adapter notes](/getting-started/adapter-notes.html): The Sourcey `openapi` adapter reads the spec and produces:

## API Reference

- [meilisearch](/api.html): Meilisearch HTTP server
- [List batches](/api.html#operation-batches-get): GET /batches - Meilisearch groups compatible tasks ([asynchronous operations](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/async/asynchronous_operations)) into batches for efficient processing.
- [Get batch](/api.html#operation-batches-batch-id-get): GET /batches/{batch_id} - Meilisearch groups compatible tasks ([asynchronous operations](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/async/asynchronous_operations)) into batches for efficient processing.
- [List chat workspaces](/api.html#operation-chats-get): GET /chats
- [Get a chat workspace](/api.html#operation-chats-workspace-uid-get): GET /chats/{workspace_uid}
- [Delete a chat workspace](/api.html#operation-chats-workspace-uid-delete): DELETE /chats/{workspace_uid}
- [Request a chat completion](/api.html#operation-chats-workspace-uid-chat-completions-post): POST /chats/{workspace_uid}/chat/completions
- [Get settings of a chat workspace](/api.html#operation-chats-workspace-uid-settings-get): GET /chats/{workspace_uid}/settings
- [Reset the settings of a chat workspace](/api.html#operation-chats-workspace-uid-settings-delete): DELETE /chats/{workspace_uid}/settings
- [Update settings of a chat workspace](/api.html#operation-chats-workspace-uid-settings-patch): PATCH /chats/{workspace_uid}/settings
- [Create dump](/api.html#operation-dumps-post): POST /dumps - Trigger a dump creation process. When complete, a dump file is written to the [dump directory](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/self_hosted/configure_meilisearch_at_launch#dump-directory). The directory is created if it does not exist.
- [List search rules](/api.html#operation-dynamic-search-rules-post): POST /dynamic-search-rules - Return all search rules configured on the instance.
- [Get a search rule](/api.html#operation-dynamic-search-rules-uid-get): GET /dynamic-search-rules/{uid} - Retrieve a single search rule by its unique identifier.
- [Delete a search rule](/api.html#operation-dynamic-search-rules-uid-delete): DELETE /dynamic-search-rules/{uid} - Delete a search rule by its unique identifier.
- [Create or update a search rule](/api.html#operation-dynamic-search-rules-uid-patch): PATCH /dynamic-search-rules/{uid} - Partially update a search rule by replacing the provided fields. If the rule doesn't exist, it will be created.
- [List experimental features](/api.html#operation-experimental-features-get): GET /experimental-features - Return all experimental features that can be toggled via this API, and whether each one is currently enabled or disabled.
- [Configure experimental features](/api.html#operation-experimental-features-patch): PATCH /experimental-features - Enable or disable experimental features at runtime.
- [Export to a remote Meilisearch](/api.html#operation-export-post): POST /export - Trigger an export that sends documents and settings from this instance to a remote Meilisearch server. Configure the remote URL and optional API key in the request body.
- [Get health](/api.html#operation-health-get): GET /health - The health check endpoint enables you to periodically test the health of your Meilisearch instance. Returns a simple status indicating that the server is available.
- [List all indexes](/api.html#operation-indexes-get): GET /indexes - Returns a paginated list of indexes. Use the `offset` and `limit` query parameters to page through results.
- [Create index](/api.html#operation-indexes-post): POST /indexes - Create a new index with an optional [primary key](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/getting_started/primary_key).
- [Get index](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid} - Retrieve the metadata of a single index: its uid, [primary key](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/getting_started/primary_key), and creation/update timestamps.
- [Delete index](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid} - Permanently delete an index and all its documents, settings, and task history.
- [Update index](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-patch): PATCH /indexes/{index_uid} - Update the [primary key](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/getting_started/primary_key) or uid of an index.
- [Compact index](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-compact-post): POST /indexes/{index_uid}/compact - Trigger a compaction process on the specified index.
- [List documents with GET](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-documents-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/documents - Retrieve documents in batches using query parameters for offset, limit, and optional filtering.
- [Add or replace documents](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-documents-post): POST /indexes/{index_uid}/documents - Add a list of documents or replace them if they already exist.
- [Add or update documents](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-documents-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/documents - Add a list of documents or update them if they already exist.
- [Delete all documents](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-documents-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/documents - Permanently delete all documents in the specified index. Settings and index metadata are preserved.
- [Delete documents by filter](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-documents-delete-post): POST /indexes/{index_uid}/documents/delete - Delete all documents in the index that match the given filter expression.
- [Delete documents by batch](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-documents-delete-batch-post): POST /indexes/{index_uid}/documents/delete-batch - Delete multiple documents in one request by providing an array of [primary key](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/getting_started/primary_key) values.
- [Edit documents by function](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-documents-edit-post): POST /indexes/{index_uid}/documents/edit - Use a [RHAI function](https://rhai.rs/book/engine/hello-world.html) to edit one or more documents directly in Meilisearch. The function receives each document and returns the modified document.
- [List documents with POST](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-documents-fetch-post): POST /indexes/{index_uid}/documents/fetch - Retrieve a set of documents with optional filtering, sorting, and pagination. Use the request
- [Get document](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-documents-document-id-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/documents/{document_id} - Retrieve a single document by its [primary key](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/getting_started/primary_key) value.
- [Delete document](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-documents-document-id-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/documents/{document_id} - Delete a single document by its [primary key](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/getting_started/primary_key).
- [Search for facet values](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-facet-search-post): POST /indexes/{index_uid}/facet-search - Search for facet values matching a query within a given facet attribute. Use this to build
- [List index fields](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-fields-post): POST /indexes/{index_uid}/fields - Returns a paginated list of fields in the index with their metadata: whether they are displayed, searchable, sortable, filterable, distinct, have a custom ranking rule (asc/desc), and for filterable fields the sort order for facet values.
- [Search with GET](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-search-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/search - Search for documents matching a query in the given index.
- [Search with POST](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-search-post): POST /indexes/{index_uid}/search - Search for documents matching a query in the given index.
- [List all settings](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings - Returns all settings of the index. Each setting is returned with its current value or the default if not set.
- [Reset all settings](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings - Resets all settings of the index to their default values.
- [Update all settings](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-patch): PATCH /indexes/{index_uid}/settings - Updates one or more settings for the index. Only the fields sent in the body are changed. Pass null for a setting to reset it to its default. If the index does not exist, it is created.
- [Get chat](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-chat-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/chat - Returns the current value of the `chat` setting for the index.
- [Reset chat](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-chat-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/chat - Resets the `chat` setting to its default value.
- [Update chat](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-chat-patch): PATCH /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/chat - Updates the `chat` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Get dictionary](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-dictionary-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/dictionary - Returns the current value of the `dictionary` setting for the index.
- [Update dictionary](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-dictionary-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/dictionary - Updates the `dictionary` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset dictionary](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-dictionary-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/dictionary - Resets the `dictionary` setting to its default value.
- [Get displayedAttributes](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-displayed-attributes-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/displayed-attributes - Returns the current value of the `displayedAttributes` setting for the index.
- [Update displayedAttributes](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-displayed-attributes-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/displayed-attributes - Updates the `displayedAttributes` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset displayedAttributes](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-displayed-attributes-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/displayed-attributes - Resets the `displayedAttributes` setting to its default value.
- [Get distinctAttribute](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-distinct-attribute-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/distinct-attribute - Returns the current value of the `distinctAttribute` setting for the index.
- [Update distinctAttribute](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-distinct-attribute-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/distinct-attribute - Updates the `distinctAttribute` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset distinctAttribute](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-distinct-attribute-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/distinct-attribute - Resets the `distinctAttribute` setting to its default value.
- [Get embedders](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-embedders-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/embedders - Returns the current value of the `embedders` setting for the index.
- [Reset embedders](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-embedders-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/embedders - Resets the `embedders` setting to its default value.
- [Update embedders](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-embedders-patch): PATCH /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/embedders - Updates the `embedders` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Get facetSearch](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-facet-search-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/facet-search - Returns the current value of the `facetSearch` setting for the index.
- [Update facetSearch](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-facet-search-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/facet-search - Updates the `facetSearch` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset facetSearch](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-facet-search-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/facet-search - Resets the `facetSearch` setting to its default value.
- [Get faceting](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-faceting-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/faceting - Returns the current value of the `faceting` setting for the index.
- [Reset faceting](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-faceting-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/faceting - Resets the `faceting` setting to its default value.
- [Update faceting](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-faceting-patch): PATCH /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/faceting - Updates the `faceting` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Get filterableAttributes](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-filterable-attributes-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/filterable-attributes - Returns the current value of the `filterableAttributes` setting for the index.
- [Update filterableAttributes](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-filterable-attributes-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/filterable-attributes - Updates the `filterableAttributes` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset filterableAttributes](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-filterable-attributes-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/filterable-attributes - Resets the `filterableAttributes` setting to its default value.
- [Get foreignKeys](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-foreign-keys-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/foreign-keys - Returns the current value of the `foreignKeys` setting for the index.
- [Update foreignKeys](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-foreign-keys-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/foreign-keys - Updates the `foreignKeys` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset foreignKeys](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-foreign-keys-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/foreign-keys - Resets the `foreignKeys` setting to its default value.
- [Get localizedAttributes](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-localized-attributes-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/localized-attributes - Returns the current value of the `localizedAttributes` setting for the index.
- [Update localizedAttributes](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-localized-attributes-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/localized-attributes - Updates the `localizedAttributes` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset localizedAttributes](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-localized-attributes-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/localized-attributes - Resets the `localizedAttributes` setting to its default value.
- [Get nonSeparatorTokens](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-non-separator-tokens-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/non-separator-tokens - Returns the current value of the `nonSeparatorTokens` setting for the index.
- [Update nonSeparatorTokens](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-non-separator-tokens-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/non-separator-tokens - Updates the `nonSeparatorTokens` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset nonSeparatorTokens](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-non-separator-tokens-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/non-separator-tokens - Resets the `nonSeparatorTokens` setting to its default value.
- [Get pagination](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-pagination-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/pagination - Returns the current value of the `pagination` setting for the index.
- [Reset pagination](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-pagination-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/pagination - Resets the `pagination` setting to its default value.
- [Update pagination](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-pagination-patch): PATCH /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/pagination - Updates the `pagination` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Get prefixSearch](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-prefix-search-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/prefix-search - Returns the current value of the `prefixSearch` setting for the index.
- [Update prefixSearch](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-prefix-search-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/prefix-search - Updates the `prefixSearch` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset prefixSearch](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-prefix-search-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/prefix-search - Resets the `prefixSearch` setting to its default value.
- [Get proximityPrecision](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-proximity-precision-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/proximity-precision - Returns the current value of the `proximityPrecision` setting for the index.
- [Update proximityPrecision](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-proximity-precision-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/proximity-precision - Updates the `proximityPrecision` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset proximityPrecision](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-proximity-precision-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/proximity-precision - Resets the `proximityPrecision` setting to its default value.
- [Get rankingRules](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-ranking-rules-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/ranking-rules - Returns the current value of the `rankingRules` setting for the index.
- [Update rankingRules](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-ranking-rules-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/ranking-rules - Updates the `rankingRules` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset rankingRules](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-ranking-rules-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/ranking-rules - Resets the `rankingRules` setting to its default value.
- [Get searchCutoffMs](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-search-cutoff-ms-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/search-cutoff-ms - Returns the current value of the `searchCutoffMs` setting for the index.
- [Update searchCutoffMs](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-search-cutoff-ms-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/search-cutoff-ms - Updates the `searchCutoffMs` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset searchCutoffMs](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-search-cutoff-ms-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/search-cutoff-ms - Resets the `searchCutoffMs` setting to its default value.
- [Get searchableAttributes](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-searchable-attributes-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/searchable-attributes - Returns the current value of the `searchableAttributes` setting for the index.
- [Update searchableAttributes](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-searchable-attributes-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/searchable-attributes - Updates the `searchableAttributes` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset searchableAttributes](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-searchable-attributes-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/searchable-attributes - Resets the `searchableAttributes` setting to its default value.
- [Get separatorTokens](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-separator-tokens-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/separator-tokens - Returns the current value of the `separatorTokens` setting for the index.
- [Update separatorTokens](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-separator-tokens-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/separator-tokens - Updates the `separatorTokens` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset separatorTokens](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-separator-tokens-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/separator-tokens - Resets the `separatorTokens` setting to its default value.
- [Get sortableAttributes](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-sortable-attributes-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/sortable-attributes - Returns the current value of the `sortableAttributes` setting for the index.
- [Update sortableAttributes](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-sortable-attributes-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/sortable-attributes - Updates the `sortableAttributes` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset sortableAttributes](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-sortable-attributes-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/sortable-attributes - Resets the `sortableAttributes` setting to its default value.
- [Get stopWords](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-stop-words-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/stop-words - Returns the current value of the `stopWords` setting for the index.
- [Update stopWords](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-stop-words-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/stop-words - Updates the `stopWords` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset stopWords](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-stop-words-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/stop-words - Resets the `stopWords` setting to its default value.
- [Get synonyms](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-synonyms-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/synonyms - Returns the current value of the `synonyms` setting for the index.
- [Update synonyms](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-synonyms-put): PUT /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/synonyms - Updates the `synonyms` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Reset synonyms](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-synonyms-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/synonyms - Resets the `synonyms` setting to its default value.
- [Get typoTolerance](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-typo-tolerance-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/typo-tolerance - Returns the current value of the `typoTolerance` setting for the index.
- [Reset typoTolerance](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-typo-tolerance-delete): DELETE /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/typo-tolerance - Resets the `typoTolerance` setting to its default value.
- [Update typoTolerance](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-settings-typo-tolerance-patch): PATCH /indexes/{index_uid}/settings/typo-tolerance - Updates the `typoTolerance` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.
- [Get similar documents with GET](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-similar-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/similar - Retrieve documents similar to a reference document identified by its id.
- [Get similar documents with POST](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-similar-post): POST /indexes/{index_uid}/similar - Retrieve documents similar to a reference document identified by its id.
- [Get stats of index](/api.html#operation-indexes-index-uid-stats-get): GET /indexes/{index_uid}/stats - Return statistics for a single index: document count, database size, indexing status, and field distribution.
- [List API keys](/api.html#operation-keys-get): GET /keys - Return all API keys configured on the instance. Results are paginated and can be filtered by offset and limit. The key value itself is never returned after creation.
- [Create API key](/api.html#operation-keys-post): POST /keys - Create a new API key with the specified name, description, actions, and index scopes. The key value is returned only once at creation time; store it securely.
- [Get API key](/api.html#operation-keys-key-get): GET /keys/{key} - Retrieve a single API key by its `uid` or by its `key` value.
- [Delete API key](/api.html#operation-keys-key-delete): DELETE /keys/{key} - Permanently delete the specified API key. The key will no longer be valid for authentication.
- [Update API key](/api.html#operation-keys-key-patch): PATCH /keys/{key} - Update the name and description of an API key.
- [Update target of the console logs](/api.html#operation-logs-stderr-post): POST /logs/stderr - Configure at runtime the level of the console logs written to stderr (e.g. debug, info, warn, error).
- [Retrieve logs](/api.html#operation-logs-stream-post): POST /logs/stream - Stream logs over HTTP. The format of the logs depends on the configuration specified in the payload. The logs are sent as multi-part, and the stream never stops, so ensure your client can handle a long-lived connection. To stop receiving logs, call the `DELETE /logs/stream` route.
- [Stop retrieving logs](/api.html#operation-logs-stream-delete): DELETE /logs/stream - Call this route to make the engine stop sending logs to the client that opened the `POST /logs/stream` connection.
- [Get Prometheus metrics](/api.html#operation-metrics-get): GET /metrics - Return metrics for the engine in Prometheus format. This is an [experimental feature](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/experimental/overview) and must be enabled before use.
- [Perform a multi-search](/api.html#operation-multi-search-post): POST /multi-search - Run multiple search queries in a single API request.
- [Get network topology](/api.html#operation-network-get): GET /network - Return the list of Meilisearch instances currently known to this node (self and remotes).
- [Configure network topology](/api.html#operation-network-patch): PATCH /network - Add or remove remote nodes from the network. Changes apply to the current instance’s view of the cluster.
- [Network control](/api.html#operation-network-control-post): POST /network/control - Send messages to control the progress of a network topology change task.
- [Render documents with POST](/api.html#operation-render-template-post): POST /render-template
- [Create snapshot](/api.html#operation-snapshots-post): POST /snapshots - Trigger a snapshot creation process. When complete, a snapshot file is written to the snapshot directory. The directory is created if it does not exist.
- [Get stats of all indexes](/api.html#operation-stats-get): GET /stats - Return statistics for the Meilisearch instance and for each index. Includes database size, last update time, document counts, and indexing status per index.
- [Swap indexes](/api.html#operation-swap-indexes-post): POST /swap-indexes - Swap the documents, primary key, settings, and task history of two or more indexes.
- [List tasks](/api.html#operation-tasks-get): GET /tasks - The `/tasks` route returns information about [asynchronous operations](https://docs.meilisearch.com/learn/advanced/asynchronous_operations.html) (indexing, document updates, settings changes, and so on).
- [Delete tasks](/api.html#operation-tasks-delete): DELETE /tasks - Permanently delete [tasks](https://docs.meilisearch.com/learn/advanced/asynchronous_operations.html) matching the given filters. You must provide at least one filter (e.g. `uids`, `indexUids`, `statuses`) to specify which tasks to delete.
- [Cancel tasks](/api.html#operation-tasks-cancel-post): POST /tasks/cancel - Cancel enqueued and/or processing [tasks](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/async/asynchronous_operations). You must provide at least one filter (e.g. `uids`, `indexUids`, `statuses`) to specify which tasks to cancel.
- [Compact task queue](/api.html#operation-tasks-compact-post): POST /tasks/compact - Trigger a compaction process on the task queue database and return its size before and
- [Get task](/api.html#operation-tasks-task-id-get): GET /tasks/{task_id} - Retrieve a single [task](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/async/asynchronous_operations) by its uid.
- [Get task's document payload](/api.html#operation-tasks-task-id-documents-get): GET /tasks/{task_id}/documents - Retrieve the document payload that was sent with this [task](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/async/asynchronous_operations).
- [Get version](/api.html#operation-version-get): GET /version - Return the current Meilisearch version, including the commit SHA and build date.
- [List webhooks](/api.html#operation-webhooks-get): GET /webhooks - Return all webhooks registered on the instance. Each webhook is returned with its URL, optional headers, and UUID (the key value is never returned).
- [Create webhook](/api.html#operation-webhooks-post): POST /webhooks - Register a new webhook to receive task completion notifications. You can optionally set custom headers (e.g. for authentication) and configure the callback URL.
- [Get webhook](/api.html#operation-webhooks-uuid-get): GET /webhooks/{uuid} - Retrieve a single webhook by its UUID.
- [Delete webhook](/api.html#operation-webhooks-uuid-delete): DELETE /webhooks/{uuid} - Permanently remove a webhook by its UUID. The webhook will no longer receive task notifications.
- [Update webhook](/api.html#operation-webhooks-uuid-patch): PATCH /webhooks/{uuid} - Update the URL or headers of an existing webhook identified by its UUID.
